{{CargoOrgan
|name=Cursed Demon Armor
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10717
|idx=75
|description="...It cast all the sins of the world into the forge, molding death and despair into armor. Wherever It walked, only the flames of catastrophe remained."
— Demon King's Revelation
|skill=Release a fighting spirit bomb, dealing DMG equal to 220% of ATK!
|hp=2580
|def=208
|atk=231
|rush=373
|gene1=Per Xenoking Organ implanted, {race} RUSH +42
Xenoking Organs implanted: 7/7
|gene2=Snail Arena, paralysis RES +4%
|gene3=Per 30 Star Coin redeems, {race} RUSH +70
Star Coin Redeems: 90/90
|gene4=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +20%
|gene5=Wind DMG +120
|gene6=In Snail Arena, CRIT DMG REDUC +20%
|gene7=Wind DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
